items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Render a path-style breadcrumb trail with custom separators, optional icons, and middle-collapse for long paths. Stateless render primitive — pass crumbs in, place the line at the top of your navigator pane.

items.name: chat-bubble
items.title: Chat Bubble
items.description: Role-aware speech bubble with width-aware wrapping. Supports user, assistant, system, and tool roles.

items.name: chat-input
items.title: Chat Input
items.description: Single-line chat prompt with placeholder, cursor, focus state, and submit/cancel key bindings. Bubble Tea model.

items.name: chat-thread
items.title: Chat Thread
items.description: Vertically scrolling conversation surface. Composes chat-bubble. Supports arrow keys, PgUp/PgDn, Home/End for scroll.

items.name: code-view
items.title: Code view
items.description: Render a source-code block with optional line numbers and per-line marks. A tiny built-in tokenizer tints keywords, strings, numbers, and comments for Go, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Rust, JSON, and Bash.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: Filterable modal command picker. Case-insensitive substring matching by default, swappable matcher. Bubble Tea model.

items.name: confirmation
items.title: Confirmation
items.description: Two-button yes/no prompt with focus-managed buttons, y/n shortcuts, dangerous-action styling, and prompt reflow. Pair with modal for destructive operations.

items.name: diff-view
items.title: Diff View
items.description: Color-coded unified diff renderer. Additions green, removals red, hunk headers highlighted, line numbers on both sides. Includes a ParseUnified helper for diff -u output.

items.name: editor
items.title: Editor
items.description: Editable multi-line text buffer with a 2D cursor, viewport scrolling, line-number gutter, undo/redo, and optional per-line syntax tint via codeview's tokenizer. The primitive a terminal-native code editor is built around.

items.name: file-tree
items.title: File tree
items.description: Interactive directory tree with expand/collapse, vim-style navigation, and optional multi-select. Renders any nested data — file system, JSON document, outline — that fits a directory analogy.

items.name: find-bar
items.title: Find Bar
items.description: In-buffer search overlay: a narrow query input with a match counter chip and Next/Prev/Close messages. Pair with editor for Ctrl-F search, or with any buffer-like component that owns text rows.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Render terminal-styled keycap glyphs for single keys, chords, and key sequences. The atom that turns 'ctrl+k' into a readable ⌃ K in your hint rows and palettes.

items.name: key-hints
items.title: Key hints
items.description: Compact footer of key-and-description pairs separated by a thin divider. The bottom-row cheatsheet every TUI grows into; build it as a primitive so it's not rewritten in every parent model.

items.name: list
items.title: List
items.description: Vertical selectable list with cursor highlight, optional hints, disabled items, and internal scrolling. The navigation primitive most agent UIs reach for after tabs.

items.name: log-stream
items.title: Log Stream
items.description: Bounded, color-coded log view that tails like `tail -f`. Drops oldest on capacity overflow, filters by level, and sticks to the tail unless the user scrolls up.

items.name: markdown-viewer
items.title: Markdown Viewer
items.description: Small markdown subset rendered to a scrollable terminal block. Headings, paragraphs, bullet lists, blockquotes, code blocks, inline bold/italic/code, and links. Bubble Tea model.

items.name: modal
items.title: Modal
items.description: Overlay container with title, body, footer, and a configurable close key. Pair with lipgloss.Place to position over a parent view.

items.name: notification-toast
items.title: Notification Toast
items.description: Stacked, dismissible notifications with level-aware coloring. Push to add, Tick(now) to expire, Dismiss(id) to remove. Pairs with any Bubble Tea app.

items.name: panel
items.title: Panel
items.description: Bordered container with optional title and footer. The workhorse layout primitive: almost every other component pairs well inside a Panel. Rounded corners, two border weights, configurable padding.

items.name: progress-bar
items.title: Progress bar
items.description: Determinate progress indicator with an optional label and percentage readout. Color-tunable fill, glyph-tunable bar runes. Pair with spinner if you need an indeterminate indicator.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Bounded single-choice popover with optional typeahead filter. The picker most agent UIs reach for when there are five to fifty options.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Animated single-glyph progress indicator with an optional label. Five built-in styles: dots, line, arc, pulse, bounce. Each spinner produces its own TickMsg, addressable by an optional ID so parent models can multiplex.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: Dashboard metric tile with label, value, trend, and sublabel. Compose a row of cards to open any operator surface — engagements, PRs, revenue, latency.

items.name: status-bar
items.title: Status Bar
items.description: Single-line three-segment status bar. Left fills from the left, right anchors to the far edge, optional center placed at the visual middle. Truncates the left segment first under width pressure.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Column-aligned data table with sortable headers, keyboard navigation, internal scrolling, and optional row selection. The grid primitive every operator surface reaches for.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Horizontal row of labeled tabs with one active label. A primitive: it owns the selection and the label row, not the panels below it. Keys left/right and tab/shift+tab cycle and wrap.

items.name: text-input
items.title: Text Input
items.description: Multi-line text input with placeholder, focus, 2D cursor, ctrl-u kill-to-cursor, alt-arrow word jumps, and home/end. Bubble Tea model.

items.name: theme
items.title: Theme
items.description: Token palette every glyph component reads from. Edit one file to retheme an entire app.
